//: OWM-11 MCP registration. The server is a thin, read-only adapter over scripts/query.sh (the retrieval source of truth) — it never re-implements retrieval. Pure stdlib, so it runs under `uv run --no-project` with no extra packages. REFUSE-BY-DEFAULT: with OWM_ALLOW unset the server serves nothing; set it to the comma-separated allow-list of in-scope repo slugs the caller is entitled to read. Set OWM_DB to the built index path (scripts/index_build.sh output). OWM_HEAD is an optional repo=sha,... map for possibly_stale disclosure (OWM-07).
